channel.title: html injection on 0xMesbaha

item.title: Hacker Ts challenge writeup
item.description: Nahamcon ctf 2022 was held from the 28th of April Until the 30th of the month , and we have participated under the team 0xcha0s. this challenge idea was pretty new to me so it is helpful to docuemnt it in this writeup
